description: Issue #5 follow-up: community-calendar repo changes that enable + correct the new .xmlui-desktop.json pattern. Commit together against ~/community-calendar — the .xmlui-desktop.json file lands with the corrected path/no-cwd shape (5+8 merge), and the redirect snippet is removed from xmlui/index.html.

items.after: Created with { "server": { "command": "python3 -m http.server 8080", "cwd": "xmlui", "port": 8080, "path": "/?city=santarosa&images=preview" } }. Baked the dev query (city + images) into `path` to preserve the behavior the old redirect snippet provided as default.
Removed the redirect snippet. xmlui-desktop now targets localhost:8080 directly via .xmlui-desktop.json; GitHub Pages production deploy never hits 127.0.0.1 so removal is safe there.

{ "server": { "command": "python3 -m http.server 8080", "port": 8080, "path": "/xmlui/index.html?city=santarosa&images=preview" } } — dropped `cwd` so the server runs at the project root, and targets `/xmlui/index.html` so the page-relative `../categories.json` / `../cities.json` / `../source_priority.json` XHRs in shell.js resolve to project-root JSON files (matches the URL shape that worked outside Tauri). Commit alongside cc-add-config.
